data.title: Middlesex Water Q4 earnings miss estimates by -2.13%, EPS of $0.46 vs $0.47. Revenue down $128K from prev year.
data.description: Middlesex Water (NASDAQ: MSEX) released its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 04:15 PM. The report revealed that the company fell short of estimated earnings by -2.13%, with an EPS of $0.46 compared to the expected $0.47. Revenue also saw a decline, dropping by $128,000 from the previous year. This marks a continuation of the company's trend of missing earnings estimates. For a more in-depth analysis, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Universal Display (NASDAQ: OLED) beats Q4 earnings by 8.59% with EPS of $1.39. Revenue up $17.63 million from last year.
data.description: On Thursday, February 19, 2026, Universal Display (NASDAQ: OLED) released its Q4 earnings results after the market closed at 04:05 PM. The company surpassed expected earnings by 8.59%, posting an EPS of $1.39 compared to the estimated $1.28. Revenue saw a significant increase of $17.63 million from the previous year. In the previous quarter, Universal Display had fallen short of expectations. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vitesse Energy (NYSE: VTS) to release 2025 financial results on March 2, 2026, host conference call on March 3 at 11:00 am ET.
data.description: Vitesse Energy, Inc. (NYSE: VTS) based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, revealed intentions to release its fiscal year and Q4 2025 financial outcomes along with 2026 projections on Monday, March 2, 2026, post-market closure. They also disclosed a conference call scheduled for Tuesday, March 3, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. EST. Interested individuals can participate in the call either via phone or through the Company’s webcast.

data.title: F&G Annuities & Life (NYSE: FG) reported 2025 financial results with details of fourth quarter and full year performance.
data.description: A prominent provider of insurance solutions, F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (NYSE: FG) based in Des Moines, Iowa, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company serves retail annuity and life customers as well as institutional clients. This disclosure includes key figures and metrics related to its operations during the specified period.

data.title: Infinity Natural Resources increases stake in Antero Ohio acquisition to 60% with $350 million investment from Quantum Capital Group.
data.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va.--Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. revealed its decision to raise its ownership stake in the Antero Ohio Utica Shale Acquisition from 51% to 60%, a move valued at $1.2 billion. This agreement was reached with Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. as part of a deal that involved utilizing $350 million from a strategic equity investment provided by Quantum Capital Group, prominent private capital investors focused on energy.

data.title: Green Plains Inc (NASDAQ: GPRE) CEO to join fireside chat at BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture & Materials Conference.
data.description: Green Plains Inc. (NASDAQ: GPRE) disclosed that its President and CEO, Chris Osowski, will engage in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on Feb. 26 at 11:15 a.m. ET (10:15 a.m. CT). The CEO will also conduct meetings with institutional investors during the event. The live webcast and replay can be accessed online.

data.title: NOG adjusts ownership split with INR for joint Ohio Utica acquisition; announcement made on Feb 19, 2026.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE: NOG) disclosed an alteration in ownership distributions related to its upcoming collaborative purchase of Antero’s Utica Assets. The adjustment in ownership splits was revealed on February 19, 2026, by NOG and INR concerning their joint acquisition of stakes in the Ohio Utica Shale Upstream and Midstream Assets from Antero Midstream Corporation and Antero Resources, Inc. The companies are making modifications to their ownership stakes in this pending deal.

data.title: Allient Inc. (Nasdaq: ALNT) to hold conference call/webcast for Q4 and full year 2025 financial results.
data.description: Buffalo-based company Allient Inc. (Nasdaq: ALNT) is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 through a conference call and webcast. The announcement signifies an opportunity for stakeholders and investors to gain insights into the company's performance during this period. This event will involve a detailed breakdown of key financial figures and strategic developments that have shaped Allient Inc.'s operations. Participants can engage with the management team and pose queries regarding the outcomes presented. The conference call and webcast are expected to provide a comprehensive overview of Allient Inc.'s financial standing and future prospects, enhancing transparency and communication with the investment community.

data.title: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) to announce Q2 FY 2026 results on March 5, 2026 after market close. Webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT.
data.description: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) has disclosed that it is set to unveil its fiscal quarter results for the period concluding on January 31, 2026, subsequent to the market closure on Thursday, March 5, 2026. The management is scheduled to conduct an audio webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on that day to analyze and deliberate on the firm's financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026. Interested parties can tune in to the live audio webcast publicly via the Investor Relations webpage at https://ir.guidewire.com/.

data.title: Jakks Pacific (NASDAQ: JAKK) beats Q4 earnings estimate by 82.69%, reports EPS of $-0.18 versus estimated $-1.04. Revenue down $3.63 million.
data.description: Toy company Jakks Pacific (NASDAQ: JAKK) released its Q4 earnings report on February 19, 2026, at 04:05 PM. The company exceeded expected earnings, with an EPS of $-0.18 compared to the estimated $-1.04, a beat of 82.69%. However, revenue decreased by $3.63 million compared to the previous year. In the last quarter, Jakks Pacific had missed its earnings targets. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Farmer Mac reports 2025 results, announces 7% dividend increase - $33.4 billion outstanding business volume, $3.8 billion growth in business volume.
data.description: In a news article released by PRNewswire, the Federal Agricultural Mortgage Corporation (Farmer Mac), a vital provider of financing to American agriculture and rural infrastructure, announced a strong fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. Highlights include a 13% growth in outstanding business volume to $33.4 billion, providing $10.5 billion in liquidity, net interest income growth to $390.7 million, and core earnings of $182.9 million. Farmer Mac also declared a 7% quarterly dividend increase to $1.60 per share. Furthermore, the conference call to discuss the financial results was scheduled for February 19, 2026, with information available on Farmer Mac's website. Non-GAAP measures and forward-looking statements were also discussed in detail. Additional information about Farmer Mac's financials and operations can be found in its Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2025.

data.title: Inventor from Michigan creates bicycle safety product "THE FLAPPER" to educate kids, promote safety.Character count: 109
data.description: In South Haven, Michigan, an inventor recently shared their motivation behind creating a new product aimed at promoting bicycle safety among children. The inventor expressed a desire to educate kids about bike safety before they start riding. This vision led to the development of THE FLAPPER, a unique design that emphasizes the importance of learning key safety aspects. By incorporating innovative features, THE FLAPPER seeks to engage young riders in an interactive and informative manner.

data.title: Match Group's CEO to speak at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 5 at 2:30pm Eastern. (NASDAQ: MTCH).
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 19, 2026, Match Group (NASDAQ: MTCH) disclosed that Spencer Rascoff, the CEO, will engage in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 5 at 2:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Harmonic's cOS platform accelerates fiber rollout for Mexico's largest MSO, izzi, reducing costs and improving broadband experiences.
data.description: Harmonic's cOS Virtualized Broadband Platform is revolutionizing fiber rollouts by reducing infrastructure costs and enhancing broadband services. On February 19, 2026, Harmonic (NASDAQ: HLIT) revealed their collaboration with izzi, Mexico's leading MSO, to streamline operations and improve broadband experiences. The innovative platform aims to optimize connectivity while minimizing expenses, showcasing the potential for significant savings and improved service quality in the telecommunications industry.

data.title: White Pearl Acquisition Corp. (NYSE: WPAC U) allows separate trading of Class A shares and rights starting Feb 24, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, White Pearl Acquisition Corp. (NYSE: WPAC U) disclosed that starting on February 24, 2026, investors who bought units in the Company's IPO will have the option to trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares independently.

data.title: Metallus reports $1.2B net sales in 2025, up 7% from 2024. Operating cash flow of $16.0M; $156.7M cash reserves. $109.0M in capex invested.
data.description: In 2025, the company achieved net sales of $1.2 billion, marking a growth of 7% compared to the previous year. This increase was primarily fueled by an uptick in market demand. Over the course of the year, the company generated an operating cash flow of $16.0 million. Furthermore, it closed the year with $156.7 million in cash and cash equivalents. To further its strategic and operational goals, the company allocated $109.0 million towards capital expenditures during the year.

data.title: Extra Space Storage reported its 2025 fourth quarter and year-end results. NYSE: EXR, S&P 500 member.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on February 19, 2026, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) disclosed its operating performance for the last quarter and full year ending on December 31. As a prominent US-based owner and manager of self-storage sites and included in the S&P 500 index, the company shared its financial figures without specifying the exact results.

data.title: Lyria 3 AI music generator now on Gemini app - late to the game with competition having the upper hand.
data.description: The AI music generator Lyria 3 from Google is now accessible through the Gemini app. While it is functional for the most part, it faces stiff competition due to other platforms having a significant advantage in terms of development time and user base.
